steps: Contact Goldman Sachs to request refund of USD 2,025.00 excess withholding on GOOGL dividend for account 1901234567
Cite US-UK tax treaty Article 10 requiring 15% withholding rate, not the 13.5% applied
Submit Form 8833 or equivalent treaty claim documentation to support the 15% treaty rate
If Goldman Sachs cannot process refund, file IRS Form 1116 to claim foreign tax credit for overpaid withholding
